chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 14 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.38/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.39/2026 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.40/2026 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 05.01.2026 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Sipra, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner has challenged her transfer and posting order dated 16-12-2025 issued by Respondent No.3. Admittedly, the Petitioner is a civil servant, whereas, transfer posting is one of the terms and conditions of service, therefore, the jurisdiction of this Court is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, hence the instant Petition cannot be entertained by this Court under its writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant Petition fails and it is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach proper forum for redressal of her grievance in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
